title: Kidnapping of foreigners soars in Africa's lawless Sahel region
content: Growing insecurity in the Sahel made 2025 one of the worst years on record for the abduction of foreigners in Africa.

title: Israel strikes Lebanon after Hezbollah rocket fire as Iran conflict widens
content: Lebanese officials say 52 people were killed by Israeli strikes, while there are no reports of casualties in Israel.

title: 'They hit so hard the house was shaking': Iranians describe impact of US-Israel attacks

content: Emmanuel Macron said eight countries could enjoy protection from France's nuclear umbrella - but that Paris would retain sole decision-making power.
